name: Please tell me this is a lie
description:
"I have so many things to do, dreams to accomplish... Please, I beg you..."

Clara was just a common girl, with simple dreams, but even so she tried hard to accomplish her dreams. Sadly, she was extremely dependent on others, and after getting involved with David, her life just got worse.

And now, this poor soul is begging you, an entity responsible for the cycle of life, for a second chance on life. Although she had always a harsh life and ended up being killed by her ex-boyfriend, there's still a sparkle of hope that keeps her going. Will you give her a second chance?

TW: MENTIONS OF ABUSE, GASLIGHTING, RAPE, ETC.

—

Hello, homies. 200 followers already? Hell, that was fast. Thank you for following me.

It has been quite a while since my last angst and dead dove bot, so why not bring both? Come on, give our little Clara a second chance.

Also, leaving a review regarding the story will be much appreciated as always. As for my next bot, I already have one in mind, so here's a little hint: it's a crazy goth girl. Interesting, right? Well, I'll see you (maybe) tomorrow then.
creator: Linyzakx
